description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a slightly flattened top and a prominent, woody stem. The pumpkin's surface is predominantly a warm orange color, with a notable patch of lighter, rougher texture on one side, possibly indicating natural blemishing or aging. The skin appears matte with a semi-hard texture, and subtle vertical ridges run from the stem to the base. The stem is short, thick, and brown, showing some fibrous detail and a dry, woody appearance. There are no visible carvings, facial features, or decorative accessories on the pumpkin. The overall look suggests it is a natural, uncarved pumpkin suitable for autumnal or urban decorative use.
description: A round, orange pumpkin with a woody stem and a patch of lighter, rougher texture on one side. The surface is matte and uncarved, with natural blemishing.
description_view_0: This view shows the pumpkin's stem and a large, pale, rough-textured patch on the left side, contrasting with the smoother orange skin.
description_view_1: The pumpkin appears mostly smooth and orange from this angle, with the stem centered and no visible blemishes.
description_view_2: This view highlights the pumpkin's roundness and even orange color, with the stem visible but no major surface imperfections.
description_view_3: The lighter, rough-textured patch is visible again, now on the right side, with the stem slightly angled and the rest of the pumpkin smooth and orange.
